src: A fluffy cat with white and brown fur, featuring tabby stripes. Its green eyes contrast its white face. The cat has pointed ears, tucked paws, a full bushy tail with a dark tip, and a pale pink nose.
edit: A knitted cat with a round head, large green button-like eyes, triangular ears, thin yarn whiskers, and plush body. Made from gray and white yarn, it has short legs and a tail, viewed from the front.

per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-IUl-bSx28WU-unsplash: The cat is crouched low on a red carpet with wide eyes. In the background, there's a blurred large red column on a smooth floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-NJDi7dUlpNk-unsplash: The cat is partly hidden behind a large textured tree trunk, head tilted to the left. Background has a faded beige wall and a slightly out-of-focus floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-S3mP4s-JKGM-unsplash: The cat is sitting upright on a narrow ledge, with a background of a stone wall in shades of gray and some green moss along the edges near the floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-iOoCYbsNYDE-unsplash: The cat is sitting on its haunches near a brick ledge, looking upward. Green leaves sprout from the soil beside it, and a wide arched brick wall fills the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-iXheXK4YeAk-unsplash: The cat walks along a rough-textured stone wall with deep mortar lines and stepped recesses, viewed while looking upward.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-ixVJDSLuLlM-unsplash: The cat walks towards the viewer, ears perked and eyes focused. In the background, a large stone wall with mortar lines stands, with a path on the left.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-n9u7QS4HrT4-unsplash: Cat partially concealed by a large textured object, only eyes and top of head visible, with blurred earthy colors creating shadow and light in background.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-tw4R1Qq5TpQ-unsplash: The cat sits upright against a dark blue and red wooden panel door, looking forward. The door is slightly elevated from the ground with a rustic, uneven base.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-vvk9olEKQo8-unsplash: A cat sits with its head tilted upward, watching intently, against a background with stepped concrete platforms and blurred lines suggesting a structure, contributing to a sense of height.

per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-IUl-bSx28WU-unsplash: A cat crouches low on a carpet the color of fallen leaves, with wide eyes like golden moons. In the background, a gently blurred vertical surface resembles a column in deep cider and garnet.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-NJDi7dUlpNk-unsplash: A cat with amber-toned fur is partially concealed behind a large tree trunk with intricate bark. The cat's head tilts to the left. The background has an ochre-toned wall and a floor with muted golden browns.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-S3mP4s-JKGM-unsplash: A cat sits upright on a narrow ledge, surrounded by stone wall textures of amber, gold, and deep russet. Golden moss clings near the floor, amidst earthy autumn hues.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-iOoCYbsNYDE-unsplash: The cat with fur like autumn leaves, sits on haunches near a rusty orange brick ledge under golden light. Nearby are brown and ochre leaves on soil, with a wide arched brick wall in deep red in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-iXheXK4YeAk-unsplash: A cat strolls alongside a stone wall with autumn leaves texture, looking upward. The wall has deep-set mortar lines, moss, and fallen leaves, casting shadows that mimic fall afternoon light.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-ixVJDSLuLlM-unsplash: A cat strolls towards the viewer, ears perked, eyes focused. Its coat is gold and russet. In the background, a curved stone wall with fiery orange and burgundy vines, and a path to the left with fallen leaves.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-n9u7QS4HrT4-unsplash: A cat's eyes and top of head peek through a large pile of fallen leaves. Blurred amber, ochre, and rust hues are in the background, mimicking autumn leaves, set in an October landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-tw4R1Qq5TpQ-unsplash: The cat sits upright against a door painted in burnt orange, deep red, and golden yellow, looking forward. The door is slightly elevated on a rustic base covered in fallen leaves and acorns, showcasing worn textures.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-vvk9olEKQo8-unsplash: The cat sits with head tilted upward, its fur in shades of orange, red, and brown. The background has stepped platforms covered in fallen leaves, suggesting a rustic structure enhanced by autumn hues.

prompt_shared: an animal knitted from a two-colored yarn
